---
title: "Interactive Widgets"
description: "Dynamic inputs, sliders, and reactive displays"
---

This page showcases Observable JS interactive widgets — all running entirely in your browser without any server-side computation.

---

## Text & Search

```{ojs}
viewof searchTerm = Inputs.text({
  label: "Search fruits",
  placeholder: "Type to filter...",
  value: ""
})
```

```{ojs}
fruits = [
  "Apple", "Apricot", "Avocado", "Banana", "Blueberry",
  "Cherry", "Coconut", "Grape", "Guava", "Kiwi",
  "Lemon", "Lime", "Mango", "Orange", "Papaya",
  "Peach", "Pear", "Pineapple", "Plum", "Raspberry",
  "Strawberry", "Tangerine", "Watermelon"
]

filteredFruits = fruits.filter(f =>
  f.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())
)

html`<ul style="column-count: 3; list-style: none; padding: 0;">
  ${filteredFruits.length > 0
    ? filteredFruits.map(f => `<li>🍎 ${f}</li>`).join('')
    : '<li style="color: gray;">No results found</li>'
  }
</ul>
<p style="color: gray; font-size: 0.85rem;">${filteredFruits.length} of ${fruits.length} items</p>`
```

---

## Unit Converter

```{ojs}
viewof convertFrom = Inputs.select(
  ["Celsius", "Fahrenheit", "Kelvin"],
  { label: "From unit", value: "Celsius" }
)

viewof temperature = Inputs.range([-100, 500], {
  label: `Temperature (${convertFrom})`,
  step: 0.5,
  value: 0
})
```

```{ojs}
celsiusValue = {
  if (convertFrom === "Celsius") return temperature;
  if (convertFrom === "Fahrenheit") return (temperature - 32) * 5 / 9;
  return temperature - 273.15;
}

conversions = {
  const C = celsiusValue;
  return {
    "Celsius (°C)": C.toFixed(2),
    "Fahrenheit (°F)": (C * 9 / 5 + 32).toFixed(2),
    "Kelvin (K)": (C + 273.15).toFixed(2),
    "Rankine (°R)": ((C + 273.15) * 9 / 5).toFixed(2)
  };
}

html`<table class="table table-striped">
  <thead><tr><th>Unit</th><th>Value</th></tr></thead>
  <tbody>
    ${Object.entries(conversions).map(([unit, val]) =>
      `<tr><td>${unit}</td><td><strong>${val}</strong></td></tr>`
    ).join('')}
  </tbody>
</table>`
```

---

## Loan Calculator

```{ojs}
viewof principal = Inputs.range([1000, 1000000], {
  label: "Loan amount ($)",
  step: 1000,
  value: 250000
})

viewof annualRate = Inputs.range([0.1, 20], {
  label: "Annual interest rate (%)",
  step: 0.1,
  value: 6.5
})

viewof termYears = Inputs.range([1, 30], {
  label: "Loan term (years)",
  step: 1,
  value: 30
})
```

```{ojs}
loanCalc = (() => {
  const r = annualRate / 100 / 12;
  const n = termYears * 12;
  const monthly = r === 0
    ? principal / n
    : principal * (r * Math.pow(1 + r, n)) / (Math.pow(1 + r, n) - 1);
  const totalPayment = monthly * n;
  const totalInterest = totalPayment - principal;
  return {
    monthly: monthly.toFixed(2),
    totalPayment: totalPayment.toFixed(2),
    totalInterest: totalInterest.toFixed(2),
    interestPct: ((totalInterest / principal) * 100).toFixed(1)
  };
})()

html`<div class="stats-grid">
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-label">MONTHLY PAYMENT</div>
    <div class="stat-value">$${Number(loanCalc.monthly).toLocaleString()}</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-label">TOTAL PAYMENT</div>
    <div class="stat-value">$${Number(loanCalc.totalPayment).toLocaleString()}</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-label">TOTAL INTEREST</div>
    <div class="stat-value">$${Number(loanCalc.totalInterest).toLocaleString()}</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-label">INTEREST / PRINCIPAL</div>
    <div class="stat-value">${loanCalc.interestPct}%</div>
  </div>
</div>`
```

```{ojs}
// Build amortization schedule data
amortData = (() => {
  const r = annualRate / 100 / 12;
  const n = termYears * 12;
  const monthly = r === 0
    ? principal / n
    : principal * (r * Math.pow(1 + r, n)) / (Math.pow(1 + r, n) - 1);
  let balance = principal;
  const data = [];
  for (let i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
    const interest = balance * r;
    const principalPaid = monthly - interest;
    balance -= principalPaid;
    if (i % 12 === 0) {
      data.push({
        year: i / 12,
        balance: Math.max(0, balance),
        interestPaid: interest * 12,
        principalPaid: principalPaid * 12
      });
    }
  }
  return data;
})()

Plot.plot({
  title: "Remaining Balance Over Time",
  x: { label: "Year" },
  y: { label: "Amount ($)", tickFormat: d => `$${(d/1000).toFixed(0)}k` },
  marks: [
    Plot.areaY(amortData, { x: "year", y: "balance", fill: "steelblue", fillOpacity: 0.3 }),
    Plot.line(amortData, { x: "year", y: "balance", stroke: "steelblue", strokeWidth: 2 }),
    Plot.ruleY([0])
  ]
})
```

---

## Data Table with Sorting and Filtering

```{ojs}
viewof tableFilter = Inputs.text({
  label: "Filter by name",
  placeholder: "Search...",
  value: ""
})

viewof sortCol = Inputs.select(
  ["name", "population", "area", "density"],
  { label: "Sort by" }
)
```

```{ojs}
countriesData = [
  { name: "China", population: 1411778724, area: 9596960, density: 147 },
  { name: "India", population: 1380004385, area: 3287263, density: 420 },
  { name: "USA", population: 331002651, area: 9833517, density: 34 },
  { name: "Indonesia", population: 273523615, area: 1904569, density: 145 },
  { name: "Pakistan", population: 220892340, area: 881913, density: 255 },
  { name: "Brazil", population: 212559417, area: 8515767, density: 25 },
  { name: "Nigeria", population: 206139589, area: 923768, density: 226 },
  { name: "Bangladesh", population: 164689383, area: 147570, density: 1116 },
  { name: "Russia", population: 145934462, area: 17098242, density: 9 },
  { name: "Mexico", population: 128932753, area: 1964375, density: 66 },
  { name: "Ethiopia", population: 114963588, area: 1104300, density: 115 },
  { name: "Japan", population: 125836021, area: 377930, density: 347 },
  { name: "Philippines", population: 109581078, area: 343448, density: 363 },
  { name: "Egypt", population: 102334404, area: 1001449, density: 102 },
  { name: "DR Congo", population: 89561403, area: 2344858, density: 40 }
]

filteredCountries = countriesData
  .filter(d => d.name.toLowerCase().includes(tableFilter.toLowerCase()))
  .sort((a, b) => {
    if (sortCol === "name") return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
    return b[sortCol] - a[sortCol];
  })

Inputs.table(filteredCountries, {
  columns: ["name", "population", "area", "density"],
  header: {
    name: "Country",
    population: "Population",
    area: "Area (km²)",
    density: "Density (per km²)"
  },
  format: {
    population: d => d.toLocaleString(),
    area: d => d.toLocaleString(),
    density: d => d.toLocaleString()
  },
  sort: sortCol,
  reverse: sortCol !== "name"
})
```

---

## Markdown Editor Preview

```{ojs}
viewof markdownInput = Inputs.textarea({
  label: "Write Markdown",
  value: `# Hello, World!

This is a **live** Markdown preview.

- Item one
- Item two
- Item three

> Blockquote example

\`inline code\``,
  rows: 10
})
```

```{ojs}
// Simple markdown to HTML converter
function simpleMarkdown(text) {
  return text
    .replace(/^# (.+)$/gm, '<h1>$1</h1>')
    .replace(/^## (.+)$/gm, '<h2>$1</h2>')
    .replace(/^### (.+)$/gm, '<h3>$1</h3>')
    .replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
    .replace(/\*(.+?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
    .replace(/`(.+?)`/g, '<code>$1</code>')
    .replace(/^> (.+)$/gm, '<blockquote>$1</blockquote>')
    .replace(/^- (.+)$/gm, '<li>$1</li>')
    .replace(/(<li>.*<\/li>)/gs, '<ul>$1</ul>')
    .replace(/\n\n/g, '<br>');
}

html`<div style="
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 1rem;
  min-height: 200px;
  background: white;
">
  ${simpleMarkdown(markdownInput)}
</div>`
```
